title: dodecatheon latilobum
intro: Dodecatheon latilobum, also known as the Fraser's shooting star, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dodecatheon latilobum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat various health conditions.
